text:
Created attachment 184856
sysutils/cbsd: update to 11.1.0

Update to 11.1.0

Changes:

  bhyve: bls now show bhyve pid in jid column
  jail: add allow_reserved_ports options (r319611)
  bhyve: improve ppt management
  bhyve: add bhyve vnc password support on FreeBSD 11.1+
